title: Desktop app crashes on save when task list contains CSV-imported data (encoding error)
problem: The desktop app (v2.3.1, macOS) crashes immediately — full process termination — when the user clicks the Save button on a task list containing approximately 200 tasks that were imported from a CSV file. A dialog mentioning 'encoding' briefly flashes before the app exits.
root_cause_hypothesis: The CSV import likely introduced text with characters in an encoding (e.g., Latin-1, Windows-1252) that the save/serialization path cannot handle. When the app attempts to encode or serialize the task data on save, it hits an unhandled encoding error that crashes the process instead of being caught gracefully.
reproduction_steps: Import a set of tasks from a CSV file (reporter's file contained ~200 tasks)
Open the imported task list in the editor
Click the 'Save' button in the toolbar
Observe: app terminates immediately with a brief 'encoding' dialog flash
impact: Users who import tasks from CSV files risk total data loss on save. The crash is not recoverable and the user loses any unsaved work. This blocks a core workflow (import → edit → save).
recommended_fix: Investigate the save/serialization code path for encoding handling. Check what encoding the CSV importer assigns to imported text and whether the save routine expects a specific encoding (likely UTF-8). Add proper encoding normalization on CSV import and graceful error handling on save so encoding issues surface as a user-facing error rather than a crash.
proposed_test_case: Import a CSV file containing non-UTF-8 characters (e.g., Latin-1 accented characters, Windows-1252 smart quotes) into a task list, then save. Verify the save completes without crashing and the characters are either preserved or the user is warned about lossy conversion.
information_gaps: Exact error message from the flashing dialog (reporter could not read it in time)
Whether the crash reproduces with a smaller number of CSV-imported tasks or only at scale
Contents/encoding of the original CSV file
Whether the crash occurs every time or intermittently
